products.name: Project Cost Planning
products.description: Connect project spending directly to financial strategy for real-time visibility into budgets, timelines, and resource allocation.

products.name: Profitability Analysis
products.description: Gain real-time transparency into costs, returns, and performance across any dimension to test allocation strategies and optimize outcomes.

products.name: Subscription Revenue Planning
products.description: Unify finance targets and sales reality on a single platform to build more accurate forecasts and drive predictable, sustainable growth.

products.name: Consensus Margin Planning
products.description: Align top-down financial targets with bottom-up operational realities to protect margins and maximize profitability.

products.name: Financial Close and Consolidation
products.description: Automate complex consolidations and intercompany transactions to shorten close cycles and ensure accuracy.

products.name: Disclosure Management
products.description: Support multi-source financial, management, and regulatory reporting with integrity.

products.name: Integrated Financial Planning
products.description: Align financial statements through driver-based planning for key areas like revenue, P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow.

products.name: Trade Promotion Management
products.description: Strategically plan, optimize, and execute retail promotions with clear visibility into spend, performance, and promotional lift.

products.name: Spend Analysis and Forecasting
products.description: Automate variance analysis and deliver fast, accurate spend forecasts for improved financial control and predictability.

products.name: Assortment Planning
products.description: Define a precise pre-season inventory strategy by aligning the optimal product, size, and style mix to each store or channel.

products.name: Allocation and Replenishment Planning
products.description: Execute with in-season precision by forecasting location-level demand and recommending the optimal inventory mix.

products.name: Demand Planning
products.description: Incorporate key business and market variables like promotions and product lifecycle changes into your forecasts.

products.name: Production Planning
products.description: Optimize production decisions across your facilities by managing various production levers.

products.name: Inventory Planning
products.description: Model your multi-tier network inventory and support various replenishment decisions.

products.name: Capacity Planning
products.description: Assess whether your existing production capacity is sufficient to meet forecasted demand.

products.name: Merchandise Financial Planning
products.description: Optimize your inventory investments and align your sales and supply chain activities.

products.name: Integrated Business Planning (IBP)
products.description: Connect your supply chain, finance, and sales plans for more integrated decision-making.

products.name: Contact Center Planning
products.description: Gain clear visibility into your contact center capacity and create data-driven staffing plans to balance service levels and control labor costs.

products.name: Project Resource Planning
products.description: Optimize the allocation of talent by gaining full visibility into project resource demand and supply.

products.name: Operational Workforce Planning
products.description: Support your annual and continuous planning needs at the position level with best practice data models and out-of-the-box metrics.

products.name: Sales Forecasting
products.description: Deliver an accurate, intelligent go-to-market forecast through dynamic scenario modeling and real-time pipeline visibility.

products.name: Territory & Quota (T&Q) Planning
products.description: Manage your quotas, territory assignments, and account management in a structured, event-based approach.

products.name: Go-To-Market Capacity Planning
products.description: Align your resources with market demand to optimize sales coverage, drive revenue growth, and achieve strategic objectives.
